source: Public RSS feeds (Sneaker Files, Sneaker News) — refreshed daily by scripts/update-releases.js

releases.name: Cade Cunningham x Nike ST Charge "Detroit Tough"
releases.note: First signature drop of the month, built around a hometown story.

releases.name: Nike Air Max Joga Bonito R9
releases.note: A mash-up of Ronaldo's 1998 Mercurial R9 boot with the Air Max 95, timed to the World Cup.

releases.name: Nike Ja 3 "Animal Pack: Tiger"
releases.note: Ja Morant's third signature shoe gets an animal-print colorway.

releases.name: Nike Zoom Hyperflight "Varsity Red"
releases.note: A 2010s basketball retro returns in a classic red/black/white scheme.

releases.name: Nike Air Griffey Max 1 "HBCU Swingman Classic"
releases.note: Ken Griffey Jr.'s signature runner honors HBCU baseball culture.

releases.name: Nike KD 19 "Candy Apple"
releases.note: Kevin Durant's latest model in a bold red and green colorway.

releases.name: Nike Kobe Dunk Low Protro "WNBA All-Star"
releases.note: The Kobe line crosses over with Nike's Dunk silhouette for WNBA All-Star Weekend.

releases.name: Nike Air Zoom Huarache 2K4 "Sue Bird"
releases.note: A 2004 Huarache retro reissued in Sue Bird's colorway.

releases.name: Nike Air Zoom Flight '98 "The Glove"
releases.note: Gary Payton's classic '98 model returns in its original black/white/red look.

releases.name: Nike Kobe 5 Protro "NY vs. NY"
releases.note: A New York-themed colorway steeped in the city's basketball lore.
